api.name: get_trade_signal
api.description: Returns a composite BUY/SELL/HOLD signal for a Hyperliquid perp. Combines RSI(14), EMA(9/21) crossover, funding rate, OI momentum, and volume into a weighted score with confidence percentage.

api.name: scan_funding_arb
api.description: Scans cross-venue funding rate differences between Hyperliquid, Binance, and Bybit. Returns top arbitrage opportunities ranked by annualized spread.

minSpreadBps.description: Minimum spread in basis points to include

api.name: get_market_regime
api.description: Classifies the current market regime (trending-up, trending-down, ranging, volatile) using ADX, Bollinger Band width, and correlation metrics across configurable assets.

coins.description: Array of asset symbols to analyze

meta.title: Crypto Quant Signal MCP
meta.description: AI trading brain for crypto perps — composite BUY/SELL/HOLD signals, cross-venue funding rate arb scanning, and market regime detection for Hyperliquid perpetuals via MCP.
